task.title: Notification Rules Engine
task.description: Implement RuleService for configurable notification routing and filtering

implementation.details:
1. Design rule condition evaluation engine
2. Implement RuleService CRUD operations
3. Add rule evaluation logic with metadata filtering
4. Support regex and comparison operators
5. Add rule priority and conflict resolution

task.acceptance_criteria: Can create rules with various conditions, rule evaluation correctly filters notifications, priority ordering works
